channel.title: Virtualizations on DevOpsTales
channel.description: Recent content in Virtualizations on DevOpsTales

item.title: Ceph Debugging on Proxmox: Essential Commands and Troubleshooting
item.description: When running Ceph on Proxmox, issues can arise at any layer of the storage stack. Knowing the right commands to diagnose and resolve problems is essential for maintaining a healthy cluster. This guide covers the most useful Ceph commands for debugging and troubleshooting on Proxmox.

item.title: Run Linux VM on macOS with Lima and Colima
item.description: Running Linux virtual machines on macOS has become essential for developers working with containers, Kubernetes, and cloud-native technologies. Lima (Linux on macOS) and Colima (Containers on Lima) provide an elegant solution for running Linux workloads on Mac with minimal overhead and maximum compatibility.

item.title: Run Podman on macOS with Lima
item.description: Running Podman on macOS through Lima provides a lightweight, Docker-compatible container runtime without the overhead of Docker Desktop. This setup is ideal for developers who want a rootless, daemonless container experience on Mac with minimal resource consumption.

item.title: veeam backup: I can not create a backup job to my AWS S3 repository
item.description: In this pos I will show you how you can backup to AWS S3 with Veeam Backup.

item.title: veeam backup: Cant Add Repository to a Scale Out Backup Repository?
item.description: When adding repositories to a Veeam Scale Out Backup Repository you may see this error: Cant Add Repository to a Scale Out Backup Repository? In this Pos I will show you how you can fix is issue.

item.title: How to: Enable Serial Console for guest virtual machine (VM) on Proxmox VE (PVE)
item.description: This article explains how to redirect messages to a serial console in on Debian and use Serial Console on Proxmox VE.

item.title: Enable Proxmox PCIe Passthrough
item.description: Proxmox VE allows the passthrough of PCIe devices to individual virtual machines. In this blog post I will show you how you can configure it.

item.title: Solution for: Proxmox backup error due to iothread
item.description: If you see the following error when trying to backup a KVM VM image on Proxmox:

item.title: Install CEHP Radosgateway on Proxmox
item.description: RADOS Gateway is an object storage interface in Ceph. It provides interfaces compatible with OpenStack Swift and Amazon S3.

item.title: Proxmox backup with pve-zsync
item.description: Backup your machines on Pfsense with pve-zsync tool.

item.title: Proxmox backup with sanoid
item.description: Backup your machines on Pfsense with sanoid tool.

item.title: Proxmox backup with znapzend
item.description: Backup your machines on Pfsense with znapzend tool.
